title: pistoo #4104
definition:
1) to make faithful, render trustworthy
    1a) to make firm, establish
 2) to be firmly persuaded of
    2a) to be assured of
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to make faithful, render trustworthy
    1a) to make firm, establish
 2) to be firmly persuaded of
    2a) to be assured of

    NASB:  to make trustworthy, hence to establish:
